description: Planning, TDD, debugging, review, and delivery workflows for coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Planning, TDD, debugging, and delivery workflows for coding agents.
interface.longDescription: A DotCraft adaptation of Superpowers, bundling workflow skills for brainstorming, implementation planning, test-driven development, systematic debugging, parallel execution, code review, worktrees, and finishing branches.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Superpowers when planning work, practicing TDD, debugging systematically, reviewing code, coordinating worktrees, or finishing a branch.
